# BarcodeFYI Embed Widget

> Barcode formats, EAN, UPC, ISBN. Embeddable widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation.

## Quick Start

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/barcodefyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>
<div data-barcodefyi="anatomy" data-slug="example"></div>
```

## Available Widget Types (7)

- spec: `data-barcodefyi="spec"`
- compare: `data-barcodefyi="compare"`
- glossary: `data-barcodefyi="glossary"`
- faq: `data-barcodefyi="faq"`
- guide: `data-barcodefyi="guide"`
- search: `data-barcodefyi="search"`
- anatomy (interactive): `data-barcodefyi="anatomy"`

## Customization

- **Themes**: light, dark, sepia, auto (follows system preference)
- **Sizes**: compact (280px), default (420px), large (720px)
- **Styles**: modern, classic

```html
<div data-barcodefyi="anatomy" data-slug="example"
     data-theme="auto" data-size="compact" data-style-variant="modern"></div>
```

## Integration Methods

1. **Script tag** (recommended): `<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/barcodefyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>`
2. **iframe**: `https://barcodefyi.com/iframe/entity/{slug}/`
3. **oEmbed**: `https://barcodefyi.com/oembed?url={page_url}&format=json`
4. **Badge**: `https://barcodefyi.com/badge/site.svg`

## Links

- Main site: https://barcodefyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.barcodefyi.com
- API documentation: https://barcodefyi.com/developers/
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/barcodefyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/barcodefyi-embed

- [QRCodeFYI Widget](https://widget.qrcodefyi.com)
- [NFCFYI Widget](https://widget.nfcfyi.com)
- [BLEFYI Widget](https://widget.blefyi.com)
- [RFIDFYI Widget](https://widget.rfidfyi.com)
- [SmartCardFYI Widget](https://widget.smartcardfyi.com)
